details.reasoning: Implementation fully satisfies all rubric requirements: (1) INIObject.zig created with create, parse, and stringify functions accepting JSGlobalObject/CallFrame and returning JSValue; (2) INI parser handles sections (nested objects), key=value pairs, and comment lines (both ; and #) with comprehensive logic including quoted values and inline comments; (3) Properly wired in BunObject.zig with lazy property callback; (4) C++ exports header updated with INI macro; (5) C++ hash table entry added for lazy property callback; (6) TypeScript definitions include full namespace with documented parse/stringify signatures; (7) Parser is self-contained in src/interchange/ini.zig with no npm imports; (8) Code follows Zig conventions using jsc.JSFunction.create, ZigString.static, and @import("bun"). Tests are comprehensive, covering sections, comments, type coercion, edge cases, and roundtrip parsing. Only minor note: PLAN.md is empty but does not affect functionality.
